name: Rogan Josh
recipeIngredient: 2 lbs Lamb or beef stew meat
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the ginger, garlic, and 4 tablespoons water in a blender. Blend until smooth.
2. Heat oil in a wok over medium-high heat. Brown meat cubes in several batches; set aside.
3. Add cardamoms, bay leaves, cloves, peppercorns, and cinnamon to hot oil. Stir once and wait for cloves to swell and leaves to color slightly.
4. Add onions and fry until medium brown. Stir in ginger-garlic paste for 30 seconds.
5. Return meat cubes and juices; stir for 30 seconds.
6. Pour in 1/6 of yogurt, stirring until well blended.
7. Gradually add remaining yogurt (1 tablespoon at a time), stirring until fully incorporated after each addition.
8. Add broth, allowing extra for beef over lamb. Bring to boil, scraping browned spices from pot sides and bottom.
9. Reduce heat to low; simmer about an hour with lamb or two hours with beef. Stir every 10 minutes.
10. When meat is tender, increase heat to medium and reduce liquid until desired consistency. Spoon off excess fat if needed.
11. Sprinkle garam masala and black pepper over the dish before serving. Mix in gently.
